entry.title: New: Bill 28, CD1 (2025) (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
"A BILL FOR AN ORDINANCE AMENDING CHAPTER 16.29, MAUI COUNTY CODE, RELATING TO FLOOD HAZARD AREAS" The purpose of this bill is to allow additional flood-prone areas not delineated on the Federal Management Agency's flood insurance rate map to be included within the special flood hazard areas.

Council of the County of Maui

View on the council site
